title: No Player Shutdown
description: A mod that shuts the server down when no players are online. Perfect to use with McSleepingServerStarter!
body:
Info

This is a mod that shuts down your server after a configurable amount of time no players are online.

My intent is that this will be used with McSleepingServerStarter.

 

How to use

Drop this mod in your mods folder Server Side.

Configure shutdown delay in config -> noplayershutdown-server.toml or noplayershutdown-common.toml.

Default shutdown delay is 30 mins, which means the server will shut down after 30 mins when 0 players are online.
